name: backlot
description: Claude Code plugin for backlot — the repo-aware environment broker that puts a running, seeded, provable instance of your web app in front of an agent.

plugins.name: backlot
plugins.description: Lease a running, seeded, authenticated env from backlot's warm pool: bind-by-sync your worktree, run classified checks, partial/per-service up, then ctx/release. Bundles the stack-agnostic backlot skill.
